title: Non GATE CSE - Others - Net Exam

questions.question:
Can someone please tell what's the use of giving UGC NET in computer science after doing MTech and have given GATE in CSE?

What benefits will NET give when applying for Phd or as an assistant professor?

What is the requirement of NET? I am currently in 1st year MTech, AFAIK we are eligible only if we are in final year MTECH(ie 2nd year) is this right?


Others: Information regarding UGC NET
